label: Give me a summary of CapEx
query: Give me a summary of CapEx trends for all 5 companies. I need the numbers in a table, not paragraph form.

label: Which company had the highest CapEx
query: Which company had the highest CapEx growth in the past 3 years? Show the data in table format then explain why.

label: Show me Flex Ltd's CapEx
query: Show me Flex Ltd's CapEx spending for the last 3 fiscal years in a table format with year-over-year change.

label: Compare the capital expenditure
query: Compare the capital expenditure of all 5 tracked companies (Flex, Jabil, Celestica, Benchmark, Sanmina) from 2022 to 2024 in a table.
